THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIRK, DAVID H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESCOTT, CARL A. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED $1,400,000.00 IN DAMAGES AGAINST DEFENDANT WESCOTT ON THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT FILED IN THIS ACTION; AND DEFT WESCOTT'S OPERATIVE CROSS COMPLAINT SHALL BE DISMISSED, WITH PREJUDICE, AND DEFT WESCOTT SHALL TAKE NOTHING BY IT; AND PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS & FEES; AND INTEREST SHALL ACCRUE ON THE ATTENDANCE JUDGMENT AT THE STATUTORY RATE OF TEN PERCENT PER ANNUM FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT).
